return(function(...)local return(function(Y,p,k,i,D,F,e,j,c,S,q,G,L,P,I,H,d,s,f,N,R,z,A)z,q,c,f,I,L,A,s,R,d,j,S,P,H,G,N=function(Y,v)local p=s(v)local k=function(k,i,D)return d(Y,{k,i;D},v,p)end return k end,function(Y,v)local end,{},function(Y)local v,d=495457+-495456,Y[-808084+808085]while d do G[d],v=G[d]-(199281-199280),(144380+-144379)+v if 249785-249785==G[d]then G[d],S[d]=nil,nil end d=Y[v]end end,function(Y)G[Y]=G[Y]-(-650367+650368)if G[Y]==118699+-118699 then G[Y],S[Y]=nil,nil end end,{},function(Y,v)local p=s(v)local k=function(k,i,D,F,e)return d(Y,{k,i;D;F;e},v,p)end return k end return(L(7036111-622007,{}))(p(e))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[v(504408+-456335)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
